risks.description: xDB shard migration complexity — 2 shards with 500K-2M contacts requires careful sequencing and validation of collection data integrity
risks.mitigation: Run test migration of collection shard to Azure SQL MI in dev environment first; validate contact counts and facet data
risks.contingency: Fall back to backup restore if shard migration fails; extend cutover window by 4 hours

risks.description: EXM IP warming period of 4-6 weeks required for 2 new dedicated IPs to reach full send reputation at 200K/month volume
risks.mitigation: Start IP warmup 6 weeks before cutover; use SendGrid automated warmup; monitor deliverability daily
risks.contingency: Temporarily route through existing SendGrid IPs during transition; accept lower deliverability for 2 weeks

risks.description: 120GB database migration window may exceed maintenance window if delta sync volume is high
risks.mitigation: Perform bulk migration pre-cutover; limit cutover to delta sync only; test delta sync timing in staging
risks.contingency: Extend maintenance window or split migration across two windows

risks.description: VPN site-to-site from on-premises to Azure must be established before decommissioning AWS VPN; throughput requirements unknown
risks.mitigation: Provision Azure VPN Gateway early in Phase 1; test throughput with synthetic load
risks.contingency: Use ExpressRoute if VPN throughput insufficient; temporary dual-VPN during transition

risks.description: 3 custom integrations (Salesforce, Akeneo, Bynder) may use AWS SDK internally; cloud-specific code requires refactoring
risks.mitigation: Audit integration code for AWS SDK dependencies in Phase 1; create refactoring backlog
risks.contingency: Wrap AWS SDK calls in abstraction layer rather than full rewrite

risks.description: Solr custom index migration — 3 custom indexes need schema recreation and full reindex on Azure target
risks.mitigation: Export Solr schemas early; rebuild indexes in dev first; estimate reindex time for 15GB of index data
risks.contingency: Rebuild indexes from Sitecore master database if schema export fails

risks.description: S3 blob provider module compatibility — unknown whether custom or standard provider is in use; Azure Blob requires different provider
risks.mitigation: Identify blob provider module in Sitecore config during analysis; test Azure Blob provider in dev
risks.contingency: Use community Azure Blob provider if custom provider is incompatible

risks.description: Jenkins to Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions pipeline migration requires full rebuild; pipeline complexity not fully assessed
risks.mitigation: Document existing Jenkins pipeline steps; map to Azure DevOps YAML; build and test in parallel
risks.contingency: Keep Jenkins temporarily and only migrate CI/CD post-cutover
